\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Declarations of Dunavant (triangle) and Gauss–\+Legendre (1D) quadrature rules. 

Provides compile-\/time tables of nodes (barycentric / 1D) and weights for\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Dunavant Orders 1 (1 pt), 5 (7 pts), and 17 (61 pts) on triangles.
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Nodes xN are given as barycentric triples $ (\lambda_1, \lambda_2, \lambda_3) $, row-\/major.
\item Weights wN integrate over the reference triangle with area 1.
\end{DoxyItemize}
\item Gauss–\+Legendre Orders 1, 3, 4, 8, and 17 on \mbox{[}0,1\mbox{]} (mapped from \mbox{[}-\/1,1\mbox{]}).
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Nodes xN are given as $ (\xi, 1-\xi) $ pairs for convenience in tensor products.
\item Weights wN integrate over the unit interval \mbox{[}0,1\mbox{]}. 
\end{DoxyItemize}
\end{DoxyItemize}

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{quadrature_8h_source}{quadrature.\+h}}.
